Think modern pressing is revolutionary? Think again. Sacchi's AC Milan of the late 80s weren't just good, they were a tactical earthquake. That relentless high press, the perfectly synced zonal marking, the ruthless offside trap? They didn't just win; they rewrote the tactical manual. Generational genius.

The 'Special One' wasn't just talk!

Mourinho's 04/05 Chelsea? They conceded a RECORD-LOW 15 goals in 38 Premier League games. Petr Cech kept 24 clean sheets. That was an unbreakable fortress, pure tactical genius.

Would today's 'super' teams even get a shot on target against them? Doubtful. #CFC #PremierLeague #JoseMourinho #FootballHistory
